generated_oml:
instance InternalTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor for monitoring incubator internal conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempData1
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Internal temperature sensor for monitoring incubator internal conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTempData2
]

instance ExternalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "External temperature sensor for monitoring ambient conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalTempData
]

instance InternalTempData1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor1
]

instance InternalTempData2 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor2
]

instance ExternalTempData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalTemperatureSensor
]

instance InternalTempData1Value : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from internal sensor 1"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempData1
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, ThermalSimulationEnabler
]

instance InternalTempData2Value : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from internal sensor 2"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTempData2
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, ThermalSimulationEnabler
]

instance ExternalTempDataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time external temperature data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalTempData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, ThermalSimulationEnabler
]

instance TwoParameterThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal simulation model with two free parameters for predicting incubator temperature"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler
]

instance FourParameterThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal simulation model with four free parameters that better captures heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Thermal actuator for heating the incubator"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Air circulation fan for maintaining even temperature distribution"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi controller managing heating operations and communication via open-source software"
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container providing thermal insulation for the incubator"
]

instance IncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPiController, InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2, ExternalTemperatureSensor, StyrofoamContainer
]

instance CalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithm to update model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance ThermalSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for simulating thermal dynamics using calibrated models"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveThermalSimulationService
]

instance ControlOptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for optimizing heatbed and fan control parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables ControlParameterOptimizationService
]

instance SafetyComplianceCheckEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for checking safety compliance based on sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SafetyComplianceCheckService
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for predicting maintenance needs based on system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance FaultDetectorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detection mechanism for monitoring system safety"
    DTDFVocab:enables SafetyMonitoringService
]

instance SupervisoryControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supervisory controller for managing system operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance StateEstimatorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimator for determining current system state"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for calibrating thermal models using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelCalibrationInsight
]

instance PredictiveThermalSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for simulating thermal dynamics under varying operational scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveSimulationInsight
]

instance ControlParameterOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service optimizing heatbed and fan control parameters for temperature regulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterRecommendation
]

instance SafetyComplianceCheckService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for checking safety compliance with regulatory standards"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyComplianceStatus
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing predictive maintenance alerts for system components"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceAlert
]

instance SafetyMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for monitoring system safety through fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetected
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing supervisory control for thermal regulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAdjustmentInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing state estimation of incubator conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateEstimate
]

instance ModelCalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Updated model parameters based on sensor data calibration"
]

instance PredictiveSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated thermal dynamics under varying operational scenarios"
]

instance ControlParameterRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommended adjustments to heatbed and fan control parameters"
]

instance SafetyComplianceStatus : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status indicating compliance with safety regulations"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert indicating potential maintenance needs"
]

instance FaultDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of faults in system components or operations"
]

instance ControlAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Adjustment recommendations for thermal control parameters"
]

instance SystemStateEstimate : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of the incubator system"
]

instance ManualAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual adjustment of Physical Twin by engineers"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AutomatedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of Physical Twin by control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated through experimental comparison of simulation outputs with physical data, as demonstrated by the four-parameter thermal model's superior prediction of heatbed thermal inertia. Calibration algorithms adjust model parameters using sensor data, and monitoring systems detect operational violations for corrective actions."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on edge computing device (Raspberry Pi) controlling the incubator's heatbed and fan based on temperature sensor inputs."
]
